generatedNote: Machine-readable map of Euler Protocol multi-chain indexer sources. Generated from euler-interfaces (addresses/<chainId>/*.json + abis/*.json) cross-referenced with the SQD Portal dataset catalog (datasets.json). All event signatures are quoted verbatim from euler-interfaces/abis (GenericFactory, EulerEarnFactory, EulerSwapFactory, EVault, EulerEarn, EulerSwap, EthereumVaultConnector); indexed flags preserved (topic vs data). Addresses are copied verbatim (checksummed) from the per-chain address JSON. Sources: EVault=factory GenericFactory(ProxyCreated)->EVault proxies; EulerEarn=factory(CreateEulerEarn)->EulerEarn vaults; EulerSwapPool=factory EulerSwapFactory(PoolDeployed)->EulerSwap pools (address[]=V1/V2 factories, both share the same PoolDeployed ABI in this repo); EVC=singleton EthereumVaultConnector status-check events. A factory whose address is zero/absent on a chain is omitted and flagged in notes. Chains with no Portal dataset are kept with portalDataset=null.
notes: chain 137 (polygon): eulerEarnFactory zero - EulerEarn source omitted
chain 137 (polygon): no EulerSwap factory (V1 & V2 zero) - EulerSwapPool source omitted
chain 143 (monad): eulerSwapV2Factory zero - EulerSwap V1 only
chain 999 (hyperEVM): eulerSwapV1Factory zero - EulerSwap V2 only
chain 1923 (swell): NO matching Portal dataset - portalDataset=null (flagged, sources still mapped)
chain 2818 (morph): eulerSwapV1Factory zero - EulerSwap V2 only
chain 2818 (morph): NO matching Portal dataset - portalDataset=null (flagged, sources still mapped)
